description: Renders one comparison card with title, badge, and highlighted state.
uiDescription: Shows a comparison panel with a heading, optional badge, and a body of concise bullets or short copy.
generationNotes: Use highlight="true" only for the preferred or recommended option.
The body should stay concise, usually bullets or very short paragraphs.
useCases: Pricing tiers, plan comparison, feature package comparison, and before/after option framing.
Avoid using it for very dense data tables.

fewShotExamples.intent: Describe the preferred option in a comparison layout.
fewShotExamples.markdown:
:::compareCard{title="Growth" badge="Recommended" highlight="true"}
- Unlimited sections
- Shared templates
- Faster publishing workflow
:::
